positive: A symmetrical, high-contrast illustration of celestial fauna and botanical elements intertwined. Focus on a majestic, mythical moth with iridescent wings patterned with nebulae and deep cosmic dust. The moth is centered within a delicate arrangement of stylized crescent moons, glowing bioluminescent flowers (like deep sapphire and emerald), and swirling constellations. Use a vibrant, limited color palette of deep indigo, electric teal, gold leaf accents, and creamy white accents against a solid, dark midnight background. The style should be highly detailed, reminiscent of Art Nouveau etching mixed with modern psychedelic cosmic art. Clean line art, strong silhouette, highly intricate, perfect for apparel print, vector quality.
